title: Command Blocker
description: A light-weight plugin to block commands and keep your other plugins hidden from non-operators 👀
body:
**CommandBlockerX** is a _Light-Weight Plugin_ that helps keep your community members and non-operators from using specific commands.
This plugin helps not only block commands, but it also keeps tab completions from showing up for blocked commands.


### Commands
  - /commandblockerx reload
